pricing_plans.name: Launch
pricing_plans.description: Best for early-stage teams getting started with CRM and basic analytics.
features: Basic integrations with Google Workspace and Microsoft 365

pricing_plans.name: Starter
pricing_plans.description: For small teams ready to formalize their sales and marketing processes.
features: Task automation with up to 20 workflows

pricing_plans.name: Growth
pricing_plans.description: Growing organizations that need advanced analytics and automation.

pricing_plans.name: Scale
pricing_plans.description: Mid-market teams standardizing revenue operations across departments.
features: Custom objects and advanced data modeling
Custom event tracking and behavioral scoring

pricing_plans.name: Enterprise
pricing_plans.description: Large organizations with complex security, compliance, and governance needs.

pricing_plans.name: Advanced Analytics Add-on
pricing_plans.description: Add deep analytics and data export capabilities to any paid plan.
features: Warehouse sync to Snowflake, BigQuery, and Redshift
Scheduled report delivery via email and Slack
API access to all analytics objects

pricing_plans.name: Premium Support
pricing_plans.description: Priority access to support and advisory services for critical teams.
features: Guaranteed 1-hour first response for high priority tickets
Quarterly account reviews with a product specialist
Access to beta features and roadmap previews

pricing_plans.name: Legacy Basic
pricing_plans.description: Legacy plan no longer sold; maintained for existing customers only.
